meaning: 1. smallpox; 2. ceiling; 3. stamen of corn; 4. (old) snow; 5. (dialect
sentence: 天花已经在全球被消灭了。
pinyin: Tiānhuā yǐjīng zài quánqiú bèi xiāomiè le.
english: Smallpox has already been eradicated worldwide.

sentence: 博物馆里有很多史前动物的化石。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn lǐ yǒu hěn duō shǐqián dòngwù de huàshí.
english: The museum has many fossils of prehistoric animals.

sentence: 犀牛是濒危动物，需要保护。
pinyin: Xīniú shì bīnwēi dòngwù, xūyào bǎohù.
english: Rhinoceroses are endangered animals that need protection.

pinyin: Tā bèi pànle wǔ nián xíngqī.
english: He was sentenced to a five-year prison term.

sentence: 节假日商场里涌来大批人潮。
pinyin: Jiéjiàrì shāngchǎng lǐ yǒng lái dàpī réncháo.
english: On holidays, a massive tide of people floods into the shopping mall.
